periods.name: Today
periods.shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 8am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 79, with temperatures falling to around 76 in the afternoon. South wind 6 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 5am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. South southwest wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before noon, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 73, with temperatures falling to around 66 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 42. North northwest wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
